name: Apple Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the molasses and applesauce in a large bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together the remaining ingredients: cinnamon, cloves, baking powder, baking soda, flour, and optional ginger.
3. Stir the dry ingredients into the liquid mixture until well combined. If the batter is too dry, add more applesauce or water as needed.
4. Pour the batter into an 8x8-inch nonstick pan or a pan sprayed with cooking spray.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 30-45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
The optional ginger will make a tasty gingerbread. Alternatively, add 3-4 tablespoons of cocoa (or carob) to create a chocolate cake that is not overly sweet or rich. If using cocoa, consider adding extra sweetening to suit your taste preferences.
